title: Network Security & Traffic Analysis
overview: Module 3 puts you inside the wire. You'll capture and analyze live network traffic, identify suspicious patterns, and understand how attackers move through networks—then investigate a real incident on a DevOps client's infrastructure.

weeks_breakdown.labDesc: TCP/IP deep dive. Wireshark capture and analysis fundamentals.
IDS/IPS concepts. Snort rules, log correlation, anomaly detection.
Client engagement. Analyze suspicious traffic + incident report.

clientContext.label: Client Context: LoneStar DevOps
clientContext.body: Marcus Webb (CEO) reports anomalous traffic patterns during overnight deployments. The dev team noticed unexpected outbound connections from the CI/CD pipeline. Santiago Reyes needs a network traffic analysis to determine if there's been a breach.

footer: Start with Lab 3.1 in the Assignments section.

notice.label: ⚠️ Spring Break follows this module (March 9–14).
notice.body: Plan accordingly—don't leave Week 9 work until the last minute.
